audit_result.proof_trace: Cache key (blockRootHex, index) excludes signature field. Attacker submits sidecar_1 with valid signature (enters cache), then sidecar_2 with invalid signature but same header → cache hit at L301 returns cached entry without executing validateGossipDataColumnSidecar (L317), bypassing signature verification (dataColumnSidecar.ts:127-137).
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker sends valid DataColumnSidecar to populate cache, then resubmits with forged signature. Cache hit causes early return (L307) before validation, accepting and rebroadcasting invalid-signature sidecar to peers via P2P gossip.

PROP-56ad1eb2-inv-032.text: Dedup cache hit must not bypass signature verification on resubmitted items with different proofs.
PROP-56ad1eb2-inv-032.assertion: forall item, seen_set: item.id in seen_set => verify_signature(item.sig) must still execute on new instance
